productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Women Concord Round Pink Casual Shoes
description: An off-take from the 1980s Basketball shoe, the adidas Concord Round sneaker reimagines the former court star in a sexy streetwise design. With a metallic foiled suede and metallic ripstop on the collar, it's a fab addition to your wardrobe. Upper Metallic foiled suede upper with a suede toe guard and textile lining along the collar Perforations on the toe region and lateral midfoot for breathable comfort Lacing system with a velcro closure for a snug, customised Fit Synthetic leather strips forming the adidas patented 3-Stripes on either side of the lacing system Mildly padded collar and tongue with a textile inner lining for comfort and optimum fit Mildly padded footbed for all-day comfort Hard back heel to lock the foot in place Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Outsole TPR outsole with herringbone grooves and a pivot point on the big toe mound for absolute durability, grip and traction Shoe care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
